channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-06
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. The `statcheck` project by MicheleNuijten has undergone administrative updates, ensuring the tool remains well-maintained. Meanwhile, `docpluck` by giladfeldman has addressed issues with TEXT-LOSS and updated documentation, showcasing the importance of meticulous detail in research tools. Notably, `escicheck` has synchronized changes with the `escicheckapp` repository, reflecting the latest developments in `effectcheck` version `0.6.13`. Additionally, projects like `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward` have made strides in validation and accessibility, with revisions to validation notes and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively. These updates demonstrate the collaborative spirit and commitment to improvement that defines our community, with each project contributing to a richer landscape of open-source research tools.

68 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck31 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck9 commits
escicheck5 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. Specifically, bugs were fixed, an archive report was added, large GitHub repositories were gated, and feedback was improved, as stated in one of the commits. Another commit updated the OSF download functionality on the `data_check` branch. The `data_check` branch also saw updates to its functions, with bugs being fixed, according to a separate commit. Additionally, a commit mentioned "improvements", but another commit on the same `data_check` branch provided more detail, such as fixing bugs, adding an archive report, and other changes, which may be related to the mentioned "improvements".

4 commit(s) today:

  • 0c8303d [data_check] fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback — Lakens
  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens
  • a73d52a [jw_llm_fixes] fix(llm): correct ollama-native gate (&& not %%); fail-fast param/model checks — Jakub Werner
  • d99956e [jw_plumber_bibr_api] feat(plumber): bibr-JSON REST API — validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime — Jakub Werner
  • 4daee8c [jw_bibr_read_passthrough] feat(read): let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through — Jakub Werner
  • 00d98b8 [jw_grobid_text_fix] fix(grobid): stop anchor normalization from corrupting paper text — Jakub Werner
  • 4d53313 [jw_schema_sync_10_5] fix(schema): sync bundled paper.json to bibr v10.5 — Jakub Werner
  • fdc5a1d [jw_fable_fixes] tests: fix test_that wrapper warnings, add expect_disjoint, env-aware .onLoad test — Jakub Werner
  • 994fb58 [jw_fable_fixes] modules: fix code_check green path, ref_miscitation report, traffic lights, stale imports — Jakub Werner
  • de6fd04 [jw_fable_fixes] core: fix GROBID text corruption, LLM crashes, API hardening — Jakub Werner
  • d91dc7e [jw_fable_fixes] read: let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through .read_bibr — Jakub Werner
  • 9483c49 [jw_fable_fixes] plumber: DRY endpoint pipeline, /modules endpoint, report=false, hardened Docker runtime — Jakub Werner
  • c42ecbf [data_check] Transparent resource caps, LLM/download controls, data-manifest + archive tooling — Lakens
  • 342b25c [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • bd8c890 [data_check] first version of datacheck modules — Lakens
  • 41a54be [data_check] prevent double crossref api, log errors — Lakens
  • bb7a5ee [data_check] updated ref_accuracy, validated. Minor fixes to reg_check and ref_consistency — Lakens
  • 6937e9c [data_check] Merge exact_p_zero_warning: flag p-values reported as exactly zero — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where "admin updates" were made, as stated in the commit message. The branch `feature-non-apa-newer` was merged from the repository https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into itself, according to the commit message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". No new features or modules were added in these commits, only administrative changes. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch mentioned in the commits. No other branches were worked on according to the provided commit messages.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
